calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2004 Vacated

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-16-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Mitch Lyon.
Alan Horwitz, Esq. for Plaintiff: Olympic View Realty, LLC.
No appearance by the Defendants: Ohannes Megerdijian and Sanpi Megerdijian aka Salpi Magerdijian aka Salpi Megerdijian.
9:35 a.m. Plaintiff's witness: Maryanne Nielson, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
Exhibit 1- Lease agreement dtd. 06-27-02-----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice dtd. 05-07-04----------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises at: 350 Arballo Dr., #3-A, San Francisco.
Damages $5,766.05
Costs $203.30
Attoeney's Fees of $750.00, against Defendant: Ohannes Megerdijian only.
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-12-2004 Off Calendar

RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER.
